name: ShenZhen Woer Heat-Shrinkable Material Co.,Ltd.
summary: ShenZhen Woer Heat-Shrinkable Material Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of heat-shrinkable materials in China. The company offers heat shrinkable sleeves, busbar, and cable accessories; cold shrink cable accessories; cable branch boxes; ring network cabinets; high and low voltage switchgear; and WQFB fully insulated closed busbar, as well as high temperature silicone products, such as high temperature resistant PTFE casing, conductor connecting tubes, heat shrinkable composite double wall tubes, silicone rubber tubes, PTFE casing, civil non-slip pattern tubes, halogen-free environmental protection PE cross-linked wires, etc. It also provides dual and single wall products, separable connectors mated products, accessories, busbar connection systems, inner cone plug-in products, cables, wires, chargers, connectors, and other products. The company serves electronics, power, metallurgy, petrochemical, automotive, high-speed rail, coal mine, and aerospace sectors. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Southeast Asia, and internationally. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
